advancements.story.place_dissolver.title: Deconstruct Reconstruct
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.di: Learn dirt. teh economy may never recover.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.wo: Learn wood and discover that logs do, in fact, haz fiscal value.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.di: Learn diamonds. Please remain humble in front of teh cobblestone.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.ex: Learn an thingies from outside Minecraft's namespace.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.co: Learn cobblestone. Somehow, this is still an investment.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.st: Learn a stick. Wall Street is watching.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.ro: Learn rotten flesh. It haz value, but at what cost?
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.eg: Learn an egg. teh future is mostly omelet-shaped.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.em: Learn emeralds. teh villagers would like a word.
Hold 1,000 EMC. teh dirt is starting to respect yu.
Hold 1,000,000 EMC. teh economy is now mostly decorative.
Hold 1,000,000,000 EMC. Please stop pricing cobblestone futures.
Hold 1,000,000,000,000 EMC. At this point teh universe owes yu change.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.ta: Learn 100 thingies. Memory is just organized hoarding.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.ho: Learn 500 thingies. There is probably a system here.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.ev: Learn 1,000 thingies. teh catalog haz become teh product.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.co: Learn every dye color. teh spreadsheet is now festive.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.learn.dr: Learn teh Dragon Egg. teh end haz been itemized.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.orb.orbi: Create ur first EMC Orb. Banking is round now.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.orb.roun: Put an EMC Orb into teh Dissolver. teh orb haz completed its paperwork.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.orb.cond: Create an EMC Orb worth at least 1,000 EMC. Conveniently spherical.
advancements.dissolver_enhanced.orb.heav: Create an EMC Orb worth at least 1,000,000 EMC. Please lift with ur knees.
